title:
PROMPT 029: Camera / DSLR вЂ” Photography Brand
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1080px (1:1)
DURATION: 3.0s | LOOP: No
SVG: DSLR camera (15 paths: body rectangle rounded, lens outer circle, lens inner circle, lens center dot, lens reflection arc, viewfinder rect, top flash hot-shoe rect, grip bump, shutter button circle, mode dial, front AF illuminator dot, strap lug left, strap lug right, body grip texture lines Г—2) вЂ” centered 540Г—540px, 200px wide

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #1C1917 (very dark warm black)
Camera body fill: #292524 (dark charcoal brown)
Camera body stroke: #44403C (2px)
Lens outer ring fill: #1C1917
Lens barrel rings stroke: #57534E (grey, 1px)
Lens center glass fill: #1E3A5F (dark blue вЂ” glass reflection)
Lens reflection arc fill: #FFFFFF20 (white 12% arc highlight)
Lens center dot fill: #0EA5E9 (bright blue AF point)
Shutter button fill: #EF4444 (red)
Top elements fill: #44403C

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Camera centered, lens facing viewer, slight 5В° tilt (rotated). Lens center catches light.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.0s total):
0вЂ“0.5s: Camera body reveals (scale 0.9 в†’ 1.0, opacity 0 в†’ 1.0, ease-out spring, slight tilt -5В° rotation maintained throughout).
0.5вЂ“0.8s: Lens elements build inward (outer ring в†’ barrel rings в†’ inner circle в†’ center dot, each 0.07s stagger, scale from outerв†’inner, ease-out).
0.8вЂ“1.0s: Lens reflection arc sweeps (opacity 0 в†’ 0.4, rotate 0В° в†’ 30В°, ease-out).
1.0вЂ“1.2s: Shutter button pulses (scale 1.0 в†’ 1.3 в†’ 1.0, spring).
1.2вЂ“1.5s: Camera "takes shot" вЂ” white flash overlay (opacity 0 в†’ 0.7 в†’ 0, 0.3s total, ease-in then ease-out).
1.5вЂ“1.8s: Post-flash: slight afterglow on lens center dot (blue #0EA5E9, blur 0 в†’ 12px в†’ 0, ease-out).
1.8вЂ“3.0s: Hold. Camera rotates very slowly +2В° в†’ -2В° (gentle rock, ease-in-out, 1.2s cycle).

EASING CURVES:
- Entry: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Lens build: ease-out
- Flash: ease-in / ease-out
- Rock: ease-in-out
